creator: tak.swd@gmail.com
text:
Sorry. patch unattached. patch as follows.

--- Makefile    2012-05-14 23:58:50.000000000 +0900
+++ Makefile.orig       2012-05-14 23:58:41.000000000 +0900
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@
 LICENSE=       BSD
 LICENSE_FILE=  ${WRKSRC}/COPYING

-ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=        i386
+ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=        i386 amd64
 ONLY_FOR_ARCHS_REASON= requires VESA support in kernel

 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=        yes

--
takanori sawada
